name: Grasshopper Pie
recipeIngredient: Baked 9-inch or 10-inch Chocolate Crumb Pie Shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie shell according to the recipe directions and allow it to cool completely.
2. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine the marshmallows and milk over medium heat.
3. Cook, stirring constantly until the marshmallows have melted. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
4. Add the creme de menthe and white creme de cacao to the cooled mixture and beat thoroughly until well combined.
5. Whip the heavy whipping cream until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the whipped cream into the marshmallow mixture.
7. Spoon the filling into the prepared crumb crust.
8. Garnish with chocolate shavings.
9. Chill for 3 to 4 hours, or until firm. The pie will hold in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
